r: Service 2 is a trunk service plying between Changi Village and Kampong Bahru, passing through Loyang Avenue, Upper Changi Road North, Simpang Bedok, Bedok, Eunos, Geylang, Kallang, Bugis, Clarke Quay and Chinatown. Much of the route duplicates the East West Line between Bugis and Tanah Merah, via Sims Avenue / Geylang Road.

Short Trip Service 2B operates during the weekday afternoons & weekends. It mainly supplements the high demand for Bus Service 2 at Loyang Ave and Upper Changi Road North to Upper Changi, Tanah Merah and Bedok MRT Stations.

Service 3 is a trunk service connecting the residential estates of Tampines, Pasir Ris and Punggol. It is also one of the few non-loop routes in Singapore to use a bus interchange as an intermediate stop along its route (Pasir Ris Int).

Short Trip Service 3A is a trunk service operating from Tampines Bus Interchange and ends at Pasir Ris Drive 12 (Blk 747A). The route operates daily after the last Service 3 to Punggol has departed Tampines Interchange.
Service 4 is a trunk loop service between Tampines Bus Interchange and Changi North Way, passing through Flora Road and Changi North Industrial Estate.
Service 5 is a trunk service plying between Pasir Ris and Bukit Merah, passing through Upper Changi, Simei, Bedok Reservoir, PIE, Paterson Road and Tiong Bahru.
Service 5A was launched on 14 August 2023 to supplement weekday peak hour demand for Service 5 from housing estates at Mariam Way & Flora Drive to Upper Changi MRT Station.
Service 5B was launched on 14 August 2023 to supplement weekday evening peak hour demand for Service 5 from Simei & Upper Changi MRT Stations to housing estates at Flora Drive & Mariam Way.
Service 4 is a trunk loop service between Tampines Bus Interchange and Changi North Way, passing through Flora Road and Changi North Industrial Estate.
Service 7 is a trunk route connecting Bedok and Clementi through Guillemard, Bugis, Orchard and Holland Road.

Service 7A is a Short-Trip Service variant of Bus Service 7, operating from Bedok Bus Interchange to Orchard MRT Station, passing through Eunos, Geylang Serai, Guillemard, Bugis and Dhoby Ghaut. Bus Service 7A began operations on 25 February 2018.

Service 7B is a Short-Trip Service variant of Bus Service 7, operating from Clementi Bus Interchange to Dhoby Ghaut MRT Station, passing through Holland and Orchard. Bus Service 7B began operations on 25 February 2018.
Service 8 is a trunk route connecting Tampines and Toa Payoh through Kaki Bukit and MacPherson. Along with Service 28 and 31, it is one of three services plying between Tampines and Toa Payoh.

Service 9 is a circular trunk route connecting Bedok and Changi Airfreight Centre through Simpang Bedok, Simei, Tampines and Loyang Avenue. It is one of three daily trunk services to Changi Airfreight Centre (formerly known as Changi Airport Cargo Complex).
Service 9A is a Short-Trip Service variant of Bus Service 9, operating from Bedok Bus Interchange and ending at Loyang Avenue (Blk 149A), operating only during the weekday evening peak hours.

Service 9B is a Short-Trip Service variant of Bus Service 9, operating from Simei Station and ends at Airline Road within Changi Airfreight Centre, operating only during the weekday morning peak hours, except Public Holidays.
Service 10 is a trunk route connecting Tampines and Toa Payoh through Kaki Bukit and MacPherson. Along with Service 28 and 31, it is one of three services plying between Tampines and Toa Payoh.
Service 114 is a trunk route between Buangkok and Yio Chu Kang, passing through Buangkok Drive, Buangkok Link, Fernvale, Sengkang West and Yio Chu Kang Road.
Service 300 is a Feeder service operating from Choa Chu Kang Interchange and looping at Choa Chu Kang Avenue 3, passing through Choa Chu Kang Avenue 2 and 4.
Service 302 is a Feeder service operating from Choa Chu Kang Interchange and looping at Choa Chu Kang Crescent, serving Choa Chu Kang Way, Choa Chu Kang Street 52 and Yew Tee MRT.
Short Trip Service 302A is a feeder bus service operating from Choa Chu Kang Drive (Yew Tee Stn) and ends at Choa Chu Kang Drive (Opp Yew Tee Stn).

lp: Choa Chu Kang St 62 / Teck Whye Lane
r:
Service 307 is a Feeder service operating from Choa Chu Kang Interchange and looping at both Choa Chu Kang Street 62 and Teck Whye Lane, passing through Choa Chu Kang Avenue 5, Yew Tee MRT, Choa Chu Kang Central and Teck Whye Avenue.

Service 307T buses on the South Loop will terminate at Choa Chu Kang Interchange and will not continue its journey on the North Loop.
Short Trip Service 307A is a feeder bus service operating from Choa Chu Kang Bus Interchange and ends at Choa Chu Kang Ave 4 (Opp Choa Chu Kang Stn) via Choa Chu Kang St 62, operating daily.
Service 334 is a Feeder service operating between Jurong East Interchange and Jurong West Street 42, passing through Boon Lay Way and Jurong East Avenue 1.
Service 405 is a trunk route serving Choa Chu Kang Cemetery, running from Boon Lay interchange and looping at Old Choa Chu Kang Road. It only operates on specific days of the year.

Service 455 is a limited-stop bus service introduced under the Land Transport Authority’s Bus Connectivity Enhancement Programme (BCEP). This service provides a direct connection to MRT Stations for estates farther away from transport nodes. Service 455 is renumbered from Service 979X.
Express 502 is an express service running from Soon Lee Bus Depot and looping at Central Boulevard, passing through Jurong East, Orchard, and Marina Bay.
Service 502A is an express service running from Soon Lee Bus Depot to Central Boulevard, passing through Jurong West, PIE and Orchard. It is a morning peak hour route variant of Express 502.

Service 871 is a Feeder service operating from Tengah and looping at Beauty World MRT Station, serving the new housing estates in Tengah and providing connectivity to Bukit Batok West and Bukit Gombak.

Short Trip Service 871A supplements weekday morning peak hour demand for Service 871 from the Tengah housing estates to schools such as Lianhua Primary School and Hillgrove Secondary School, as well as to the vicinity of Bukit Gombak MRT Station along Bukit Batok East Avenue 5.
Service 903 is a Feeder service operating from Woodlands Bus Interchange and looping at Woodlands Train Checkpoint along Woodlands Centre Road, passing through Riverside Road and Marsiling Lane.

Service 979 is a trunk service plying from Bukit Panjang and looping at Choa Chu Kang Crescent within the Yew Tee estate. It passes through Woodlands Road, Stagmont Ring, Choa Chu Kang Street 52 and Yew Tee MRT.
Service 993 is a trunk service operating from Jurong East Bus Interchange and loops at Bukit Batok West Avenue 8, serving residential estates in Bukit Batok West.

Service 67 is a trunk route linking Choa Chu Kang and Tampines via Bukit Panjang, Upper Bukit Timah, Bukit Timah, Little India, Kallang, Sims Avenue and Bedok North. Much of the route duplicates the East-West Line and Downtown Line.
Service 66 is a trunk service plying from Jurong East and looping at Beauty World, passing through Bukit Batok.

Service 30 is a trunk service plying between Bedok and Boon Lay, passing through Geylang Serai, Mountbatten, HarbourFront, Pasir Panjang, Teban Gardens and Corporation Drive, running from East to West of Singapore.
Service 30e is an express variant of Service 30, plying between Bedok and Pasir Panjang. It passes through Pasir Panjang, HarbourFront, MCE, Old Airport and Bedok.

Service 41 is a residential and industrial trunk route from Jurong East Interchange and looping at Jalan Anak Bukit / Beauty World MRT Station, passing through Toh Guan Road, Toh Guan Industrial Estate, Toh Tuck Road, Jalan Jurong Kechil and Upper Bukit Timah Road.

r: Service 10e is an express variant of Bus Service 10, plying between Bedok Road and Shenton Way. It connects East Coast to the CBD while skipping Tanjong Katong and Old Airport.
Service 11 is a trunk service from Lorong 1 Geylang and looping at Rhu Cross, via Stadium Cres / Drive.
